Convinced natural causes are not to blame, Lucy calls in DCI Barnaby and Sergeant Troy, whose investigation eventually uncovers sinister long-buried secrets. The first ever episode of the long-running detective drama, guest starring Jessica Hynes and Emily Mortimer(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Mike joins forces with Scotland Yard when a gang of thieves turns up in Aidensfield, apparently plotting to steal a valuable horse from local trainer Kieron Doyle. The heroic copper doggedly pursues his quarry to the detriment of his relationship with Tricia - but tragedy strikes, leaving him heartbroken(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A woman's body is discovered in Captain Hastings' garage on Bonfire Night. It transpires that the deceased was due to marry an MP - and although the evidence suggests suicide, the Belgian detective suspects foul play. David Suchet, Hugh Fraser and Philip Jackson star(n)

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: The detective investigates the discovery of an unidentified teenage boy's body in a coastal town's shipyard, who is revealed to be listed as a missing person, having absconded from the care of his support worker. Vera discovers that the quiet community where he was found is plagued by a serious drugs problem - despite the fact that the only known dealer in the area has turned his back on crime. The victim could be the answer to the mystery, but a wall of silence surrounds his death. Mark Addy guest stars(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: When police sergeant Pete Garvey is killed, the investigation proves harrowing for Devlin as he was one of his best friends. The detective discovers the officer had recently been in contact with their childhood parish priest Jonathan Nugent, who Pete claimed sexually abused him as a child. Unable to place a straightforward murder charge against Nugent, Steel and Phillips take an unusual approach to bring him to trial. Guest starring Matthew Marsh, Ruth Gemmell and Patrick Malahide, with Jamie Bamber(n)

programme.title: World of Sport: Dare Devils
programme.desc: A delve into ITV's sporting archives as Richard Henwood takes a look back at daredevil jumps by Evel Knievel and Eddie Kidd(n)

programme.title: The Protectors
programme.desc: Contessa Caroline di Contini journeys to Venice to discover what happened to George. Drama, starring Robert Vaughn and Nyree Dawn Porter(n)

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Templar investigates allegations that the Loch Ness monster not only exists, but is also responsible for a mysterious spate of killings in Scotland. Fulton Mackay guest stars alongside Roger Moore(n)

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: Theo is convinced that the suspects in the murder of a book-keeper are innocent, but his attempts to prove it lead him into conflict with the FBI, who have their own agenda(n)

programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.desc: The body of a girl is found at the side of a motorway and Monahan thinks the victim's boyfriend murdered her, but he insists that she committed suicide(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Terry minds a boxer, but is less than impressed to discover the promoter is betting on his opponent to win the next bout. Arthur, meanwhile, switches bets. Alfred Marks, Paul Barber and Vicki Michelle guest star(n)

programme.title: RWC 2019 Live
programme.desc: Russia v Samoa (Kick-off 11.15am). Martin Bayfield presents coverage of the Pool A clash, which takes place at Kumagaya Rugby Stadium in Kumagaya City, Japan. Russia are participating in just their second Rugby World Cup, and will hope to perform better than they did in Australia in 2011, when they lost all four of their pool-stage matches. With commentary by Nick Mullins and Scott Hastings, and analysis from Maggie Alphonsi, Gareth Thomas and Michael Lynagh(n)

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: Theo and Crocker head for a small Nevada town to bring a witness in a Mob trial back to New York - but there are several hired thugs in the area with their own plans for him(n)

programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.desc: An illiterate man is killed in an industrial accident because he was unable to read the warning signs, so Quincy sets out to investigate the tragic accident(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Terry arrives home to find a nine-year-old boy on his doorstep claiming to be his son, and ends up with a minding job he had not anticipated. He forms a bond with the youngster, eventually taking his side against his stepfather. Sharon Duce guest stars, with Dennis Waterman(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie works alongside an old friend who once saved his life while serving in the SAS, and has difficulty coping with mounting evidence that his ex-colleague has joined the gang of Italian terrorists they are shadowing. Crime drama, starring Lewis Collins, Martin Shaw and Gordon Jackson(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: A business tycoon is blackmailed for his part in a massacre while serving in the Army 25 years earlier. However, his problems are compounded after he seeks help from his former commanding officer. Colin Jeavons guest stars, with John Thaw(n)

programme.title: RWC 2019 Highlights
programme.desc: Russia v Samoa. Richard Henwood presents action from the Pool A clash, which took place at Kumagaya Rugby Stadium in Kumagaya City, Japan. With commentary by Nick Mullins and Scott Hastings(n)

programme.title: The Car Years
programme.desc: Vicki Butler-Henderson and Alex Riley champion cars from 1955. Vicki chooses the Mercedes 190SL, while Alex plumps for the British MGA sports car(n)

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as celebrity contestants Jay Rayner, Lucy Porter, Krishnan Guru-Murthy and Steve Davis pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They must work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught(n)

programme.title: High Plains Drifter (1973)
programme.desc: A mysterious stranger is hired to defend a remote frontier town from three outlaws who are making people's lives a misery. Although he rids the community of the troublemakers, the residents' lives take a turn for the worse as their saviour seizes control of the town and seeks to punish them for their past sins. Western, directed by and starring Clint Eastwood, alongside Verna Bloom and Marianna Hill(n)

programme.title: RWC 2019 Live
programme.desc: Fiji v Uruguay (Kick-off 6.15am). Coverage of the Pool D fixture, which takes place at Kamaishi Recovery Memorial Stadium in Kamaishi City, Japan. These nations could only manage one win between them at the 2015 World Cup, so this represents an excellent opportunity to claim a morale-boosting victory in a pool that also includes Australia, Wales and Georgia. Presented by Craig Doyle, with analysis from Sean Fitzpatrick, Michael Lynagh and Maggie Alphonsi, and commentary by Miles Harrison and Alan Quinlan(n)

programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.desc: A psychic housewife is enlisted to help Quincy track down a crazed sex-attacker and the murderer of several young women, putting her own life in danger(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur celebrates a reunion with old army pal Yorkie. However, after a particularly hard drinking session the visitor loses both his trousers and his bearings, leaving it up to Terry to track him down before his wife is made aware of the situation. Brian Glover guest stars, with George Cole and Dennis Waterman(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie and Doyle infiltrate a gang smuggling art treasures and industrial secrets out of the country and selling them on to foreign powers. programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: The son of an ex-informant is kidnapped and the Flying Squad is brought in to assist in the hunt. Against Regan's advice his father, a wealthy businessman, pays the ransom and the boy is returned. However, the reunion quickly turns sour. Joss Ackland guest stars, with John Thaw(n)

programme.title: RWC 2019 Highlights
programme.desc: Fiji v Uruguay. Jill Douglas presents highlights of the Pool D fixture, which took place at Kamaishi Recovery Memorial Stadium inKamaishi City, Japan. programme.title: The Car Years
programme.desc: Vicki Butler-Henderson and Alex Riley choose cars from 1980. Vicki likes the Audi Quattro, while Alex goes for a Renault 5 Turbo(n)

programme.title: Made in Britain
programme.desc: A look behind the scenes at British brands, including an insight into how Yorkshire puddings are made on a huge scale, and life inside Britain's last remaining pencil factor. Plus, how one man's quest to make the perfect present for his dad ended with him producing handmade globes that are now in demand around the world. Narrated by Ricky Tomlinson(n)

programme.title: Lethal Weapon 2 (1989)
programme.desc: Headstrong cop Martin Riggs and his cautious partner Roger Murtaugh stumble across a plot by a South African diplomat to launder drugs money by shipping gold coins into the US via his embassy. Protected by diplomatic immunity, the crook looks certain to evade the law - while his chief henchman has a connection to Riggs' traumatic past. Action thriller sequel, with Mel Gibson, Danny Glover, Joe Pesci, Joss Ackland, Derrick O'Connor and Patsy Kensit(n)

programme.title: Ali (2001)
programme.desc: Biopic of champion boxer Muhammad Ali, covering events from his 1964 fight with Sonny Liston to his Rumble in the Jungle with George Foreman 10 years later. Along the way, the fighter converts to Islam, maintains a conflicted friendship with Malcolm X and causes controversy with his refusal to fight in the Vietnam War. Directed by Michael Mann and starring Will Smith, Jamie Foxx, Jon Voight and Mario Van Peebles(n)

programme.title: RWC 2019 Live
programme.desc: Italy v Canada (Kick-off 8.45am). Coverage of the Pool B encounter, which takes place at Fukuoka Hakatanomori Stadium in Fukuoka City, Japan. While they may not be known as a rugby union powerhouse Canada have featured at every addition of the World Cup, and even reached the quarter-final stage in 1991, but four years ago lost all four of their pool matches, crashing out at the first stage. Presented by Mark Pougatch with analysis from Sir Clive Woodward and Lawrence Dallaglio, and commentary by Martin Gillingham, Scott Hastings and Jamie Roberts(n)

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Simon Templar investigates the murder of a journalist friend, following a trail of clues that leads to a cult obsessed with the splendour and savagery of ancient Rome. Drama, guest starring Peter Wyngarde and Ed Bishop(n)

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: Theo helps his old partner in Las Vegas, who has arrested an elderly counterfeiter, only for the crook to be murdered in custody. Guest starring Eileen Brennan (Private Benjamin)(n)

programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.desc: Part one of two. The coroner suffers pre-wedding nerves, a feeling heightened by his investigation into the case of a woman who claims to have killed her husband(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur loses a fortune in cash when his wine supplier is mugged and the money he entrusted is stolen. To add insult to injury the dodgy entrepreneur becomes the prime suspect for the attack, leading him and Terry on a mission to prove his innocence. George Cole stars(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: A recently released convict causes chaos when he takes a group of hospital patients hostage. Bodie and Doyle try to get to him before he can start shooting. Drama, starring Martin Shaw, Lewis Collins and Gordon Jackson(n)

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: An investigation into the Loch Ness Monster in which extreme angler Jeremy Wade sets out to examine the evidence, review famous sightings and photographs and talk to eyewitnesses, as he researches the real creature that lies behind the myth(n)

programme.title: RWC 2019 Highlights
programme.desc: England v USA. Jill Douglas presents highlights of the Pool C encounter, which took place at Kobe Misaki Stadium in Kobe City, Japan, and saw England enter as huge favourites to claim the victory. Plus the best of the action from Italy v Canada in Pool B. With commentary by Nick Mullins, Ben Kay, Ugo Monye, Martin Gillingham, Jamie Roberts and Scott Hastings(n)

programme.desc: James Haydon introduces round 10 from Assen in the Netherlands. With commentary by Jack Burnicle and James Whitham(n)

programme.desc: Headstrong cop Martin Riggs and his cautious partner Roger Murtaugh stumble across a plot by a South African diplomat to launder drugs money by shipping gold coins into the US via his embassy. Protected by diplomatic immunity, the crook looks certain to evade the law - while his chief henchman has a connection to Riggs' traumatic past. Action thriller sequel, with Mel Gibson, Danny Glover, Joe Pesci, Joss Ackland, Derrick O'Connor and Patsy Kensit(n)

programme.title: Ali (2001)
programme.desc: Biopic of champion boxer Muhammad Ali, covering events from his 1964 fight with Sonny Liston to his Rumble in the Jungle with George Foreman 10 years later. Along the way, the fighter converts to Islam, maintains a conflicted friendship with Malcolm X and causes controversy with his refusal to fight in the Vietnam War. Directed by Michael Mann and starring Will Smith, Jamie Foxx, Jon Voight and Mario Van Peebles(n)

programme.title: RWC 2019 Live
programme.desc: Italy v Canada (Kick-off 8.45am). Coverage of the Pool B encounter, which takes place at Fukuoka Hakatanomori Stadium in Fukuoka City, Japan. While they may not be known as a rugby union powerhouse Canada have featured at every addition of the World Cup, and even reached the quarter-final stage in 1991, but four years ago lost all four of their pool matches, crashing out at the first stage. Presented by Mark Pougatch with analysis from Sir Clive Woodward and Lawrence Dallaglio, and commentary by Martin Gillingham, Scott Hastings and Jamie Roberts(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: The son of an ex-informant is kidnapped and the Flying Squad is brought in to assist in the hunt. Against Regan's advice his father, a wealthy businessman, pays the ransom and the boy is returned. However, the reunion quickly turns sour. Joss Ackland guest stars, with John Thaw(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie and Doyle infiltrate a gang smuggling art treasures and industrial secrets out of the country and selling them on to foreign powers. Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith are on hand to assess the results of their efforts and decide who will be leaving the tent(n)

programme.title: The Circle
programme.desc: Emma Willis hosts the series asking provocative questions about modern identity, how people portray themselves and how they communicate through social media. Eight individuals from all walks of life compete in a popularity contest to win a cash prize. They will all live in one modern block, but separately in individual apartments, interacting with one another exclusively through a bespoke voice-activated social media platform. Emma is joined in the studio by the contestants' friends and families and last year's winner(n)

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Fly-on-the-wall series turning the cameras on TV's most vocal armchair critics, as the show's regular gaggle of families, friends and viewing party acquaintances settle down to share their insightful, passionate and sometimes emotional critiques on what they have been watching during the week from the comfort of their own sofas(n)

programme.title: Crime and Punishment
programme.desc: The documentary goes inside the walls of Winchester Prison - which was placed into special measures in December 2017 - at a time when overcrowding, violence and drug use across the prison system in the United Kingdom is at an all-time high. Filmed over a 48-hour period - with access to the prisoners, staff and senior management - the episode focuses on a time of significant unrest, when deteriorating conditions and inmates being locked away for more than 23 hours a day lead to major protests(n)

programme.title: Shocking Emergency Calls
programme.desc: The most unusual calls made to emergency operators, beginning with an escaped tiger and the case of a school book-keeper who had to talk down a heavily armed man(n)

programme.title: Tories At War
programme.desc: Documentary filmed over the last nine months, telling the inside story of the bitter hatreds that mark the Conservative Party's struggle over the defining issue of the day - Brexit. Featuring access to Cabinet ministers, Brexiteers and Remainer rebels, including Jacob Rees-Mogg, Sir Nicholas Soames, Anna Soubry, Sir Alan Duncan, Andrew Bridgen and Nicky Morgan, the programme starts in January as Prime Minister Theresa May battles to sell her hard withdrawal agreement to an increasingly sceptical House of Commons(n)

programme.title: Thelma (2017)

programme.title: Inside

programme.title: Secret Scotland
programme.desc: Susan Calman heads to Stirling, Scotland's historical heartland. At the iconic Wallace Monument, she learns what is like to hold William Wallace's sword, before climbing to the top to enjoy the view. In the Great Hall of Stirling Castle, the ex-Strictly star is taught how to Highland dance, all while uncovering a few secrets about Mary Queen of Scots. Continuing with the theme of traditional entertainment, Susan also has a go on the bagpipes and tries her hand at curling. At a medieval village, the comedian learns the secrets of being a shield maiden, before ending her journey at Loch Lomond(n)

programme.title: The Highland Midwife

programme.title: Secrets of the Royals

programme.title: Sex on the Streets
programme.desc: Documentary examining the lives of three sex workers. Storm Huntley uncovers the spectrum of escort experiences, from tales of empowerment and seduction to shocking horror stories. She meets a man who has been paying for sex for more than 40 years. Known for his reviews of sex workers in brothels across the country, Storm speaks to him in his family home. programme.title: Secret Scotland
programme.desc: Susan Calman heads to the Highlands, where she searches for Scotland's most secretive super star - the Loch Ness monster. She meets a man who has spent almost 30 years waiting for a sighting of Nessie, before having a go in a home-made submarine. From the depths of the loch, Susan then heads to the highest point in the UK - Ben Nevis - discovering why the area is famous for its strongmen. Later, she tracks down the secret spot from which Bonnie Prince Charlie started the doomed Jacobite uprising, before ending her latest leg observing and interacting with a colony of seals(n)

programme.desc: The designers who create outfits for royal occasions, including wedding dresses. Featuring a look at some of the most memorable dresses and interviews with their creators. Meanwhile, elite pilots are being put through their paces in a new simulator and at BA headquarters, the staff prepare for a royal visit to commemorate the company's centenary(n)

programme.desc: Rick turns himself into a pickle in one of his crazy experiments. Meanwhile, Beth, Summer and Morty attend family therapy sessions prompted by the school(n)

programme.title: Rick and Morty
programme.desc: The duo are summoned by superhero team the Vindicators to thwart their arch-nemesis Worldender, but they wind up snared in a death trap conceived by Drunk Rick(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Michelle and Gary Cole from Birmingham have both suffered from ill health over the past few years and have decided that the rejuvenating effects of the Spanish sun are just what the doctor ordered. They're looking for a holiday home where they and their two kids can spend quality time together. Laura Hamilton shows them five properties on the Costa Blanca for their £65,000 budget(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Anne Hogarth first fell in love with Lanzarote over a decade ago and now, after several visits to the island since, is looking for a holiday home to enjoy in her retirement. With her daughter Rachel along for moral support, Jonnie Irwin shows Anne five properties in the resort of Puerto del Carmen for her £85,000 budget(n)

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Matt and Lucia's house in Royal Wootton Bassett, Wiltshire, is bulging at the seams, as it is home to not only them but three grown-up children from previous relationships. Matt loves it but Lucia does not, so while Kirstie Allsopp tries to change the layout, Phil Spencer finds some alternative properties. But will the family choose to up sticks or stay where they are?(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Tim races to get his chateau ready for the first paying guests, battling to get a fence built for a marauding flock of 25 sheep, while partner Krys tries to balance the books(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Cosmetic surgery fan Shanice hosts the first of a week of dinner parties in and around Guildford, Surrey, where risky menu choices and a fellow diner's laugh become talking points(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Retired estate agent Vivi hosts the second dinner party in and around Guildford, and hopes to win with a Norwegian feast, as tensions rise between Shanice and Charlotte(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Sales manager Charlotte hosts the third night of a week of dinner parties in and around Guildford, hoping to impress her guests enough to win the £1,000 prize money. However, she has taken a huge risk with an Asian-inspired menu, which could prove to be too exotic for entertainments manager David(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The penultimate day in and around Guildford, Surrey, sees children's entertainments manager David playing host. Having worked in the entertainments industry all his life, he is no stranger to showing people a good time, and employs his colleagues to put on a performance, while keeping his food simple. Is he forgetting the key ingredients of a dinner party?(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the final day in and around Guildford, Surrey, sales director Neil devises a sophisticated menu, dismissing his predecessors' efforts as unambitious. However, his unusual fayre is tempered by his choice of yodelling entertainment, which threatens to hinder his chance of scooping the £1,000 prize(n)

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home
programme.desc: In this art deco special, George takes on a challenging period property in Newquay, owned by Gareth and Frances Jenkins. The building was once an architectural gem, but over the years has been the victim of unsympathetic modernisations, making it unrecognisable from its 1930s heyday. The challenge is to strip away the ugly accretions to reveal the house in all its glory - while also making it suitable for modern family living. Plus, George visits a stunning seaside home and Britain's biggest collection of neon signs(n)

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Young meerkat couple Beagle and Huskie become parents for the first time, and spider monkey Kiara is finding it increasingly difficult to bring up her first daughter, Laura. Meanwhile, vets decide to examine painted dog K'mana's ankle because of an old injury, leaving her partner Ville alone to cope with their seven adolescent puppies(n)

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Professor Noel Fitzpatrick performs a risky procedure to save the life of an 18-week-old cockapoo puppy that has fractured its neck following an accident in the garden. He also comes to the aid of Romanian stray Geoffrey, who was found abandoned and emaciated before being adopted by Kent couple John and Stacey, and an accident-prone cat called MK who has fallen from a window(n)

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud returns to Devon to meet Kevin McCabe, a man who wanted to build one of the biggest houses the programme has ever seen. Finally, seven years after it began, the herculean task of building this giant cob castle is complete. Has it proven to be the great home he originally intended, and does it prove as he hoped that cob is a viable material for contemporary architecture?(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Dick gets to work on the walled garden in the spring and buys a mini tractor for the job - but it may not fit through the gate. Angel designs another suite, with black walls and mosaic mirrors, and decorates the entire dining room with blossoms so a guest can make a special wedding proposal. The couple also consider the possibility of truffle farming(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Patients whose visions of the world are rocked by life-changing events, including 44-year-old Sergio, who is flown in by air ambulance after a cycling accident. Another cyclist - 71-year-old Alan - arrives in resus after being in a collision with a van. Doctors suspect a head injury and multiple fractures. Alan's wife Jenny reveals how she met him and how a sudden accident involving her son burst their idyll and took their lives on an unexpected path(n)

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: A woman who has been badly cut in a Saturday night pub fight endures an agonising wait for medical care, while medics attend a habitual caller who has requested help rather than use medication to control his symptoms - one of many non-urgent cases handled by the Wiltshire's(n)

programme.title: 999: On the Frontline
programme.desc: Paramedics help a drunk driver who has crashed on a dual carriageway, but find themselves on the receiving end of a vicious attack. In Bromsgrove, an ambulance comes under siege(n)

programme.title: Mary Kills People
programme.desc: It's been eight months since Mary and Des framed Grady, their drug dealer, for the deaths of their patients. Des has been serving prison time to protect his partner, while Mary has been managing well on her own. Her business has continued to thrive, and her ex-husband Kevin has moved in and taken on half the parenting duties after a messy break-up with Louise. Though Jess still suspects her mother is hiding something, Mary has been working diligently to keep her professional and private lives separate. However, secrets can only be hidden for so long after a mysterious woman named Olivia comes to Mary and Des with a deadly request. Caroline Dhaveras and Richard Short star(n)

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Young meerkat couple Beagle and Huskie become parents for the first time, and spider monkey Kiara is finding it increasingly difficult to bring up her first daughter, Laura. Meanwhile, vets decide to examine painted dog K'mana's ankle because of an old injury, leaving her partner Ville alone to cope with their seven adolescent puppies(n)

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Professor Noel Fitzpatrick performs a risky procedure to save the life of an 18-week-old cockapoo puppy that has fractured its neck following an accident in the garden. He also comes to the aid of Romanian stray Geoffrey, who was found abandoned and emaciated before being adopted by Kent couple John and Stacey, and an accident-prone cat called MK who has fallen from a window(n)

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty investigates what makes fizzy sweets effervesce and swots up on his chemistry to see if he can harness their explosive power in a rocket. In Ireland, Kate Quilton finds out if a range of vitamin-enriched mushrooms could help the one in five Britons who lack vitamin D, while Matt Tebbutt explores claims that raw kale may be bad for people's health(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Although she's approaching retirement age, Karmen Meredith is in no mood to slow down. Instead, the Derbyshire woman is looking for a bolthole on Spain's Costa del Sol, so Danni Menzies shows her five properties to choose between(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Patrick and Corrine Duly from East Sussex first visited Lanzarote four years ago. They immediately fell in love with the island, and now that they've retired they're looking for a holiday home where they can escape to and spend more active winters in the sun. With a budget of £140,000, Scarlette Douglas shows them five properties in the south of the island(n)

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: The duo meet a couple of medics whose three-bedroom Victorian semi is no longer working for them and their two young daughters. GP Kathleen loves the location and reckons the house could be made to work but anaesthetist Tom prefers the idea of selling to pursue a better life in the country. Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer follow up each possibility, nursing the doctors to a unanimous decision as to whether they should stay or sell(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Angel Adoree teaches Belinda the art of decoupage on a classic 1950s family dressing table, and Elaine and David visit a 19th-century chateau in Normandy(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the first night in Peterborough, 39-year-old land surveyor and part-time musician Muneer hopes to win over his guests with a menu based on Pakistani recipes passed down through his family for generations. The authenticity extends beyond his food, with Muneer seating his guests on the floor of his specially dressed dining room. His guests include driving instructor Christine, hairdresser Ben, fiery Brazilian Rosie and fridge salesman Gregory. While his food receives mixed reviews, His guests discover his master plan for musical success, suffer bad jokes and find out that one of their fellow diners believes in mermaids(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Peterborough, driving instructor Christine hopes her vegetarian cuisine will grab her the £1,000 prize. But she's worried about being in the firing line, after Rosie compared Muneer's food to vomit on the first night. Now Moony's determined to give Rosie a public dressing down. However, with everyone dreading Christine's meat-free and bland-sounding menu, Rosie may not be the only one who has to bite her lip(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Peterborough, mobile hairdresser Ben plans a gourmet night. Most of his guests are looking forward to some meat after Christine's vegetarian feast the night before. And after laid-back Muneer and critical Rosie seem to have put their tension behind them at Christine's, Ben's determined to take things up a notch as he entertains his guests with his amazing body art, cooking skills and pet crabs(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Fridge salesman Gregory serves up a Spanish menu in Peterborough, accompanied by a charm offensive that he hopes will win him the £1,000 prize. Will it work or will the guests give him the cold shoulder?(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Fiery Brazilian Rosie hosts the final meal in Peterborough, but her brutally honest critiques have ruffled a few feathers throughout the week, leaving her guests in picky moods(n)

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home
programme.desc: Architect George Clarke returns to unlock the potential of old houses. He meets teachers Simon and Sofie, whose 1930s Liverpool semi has lost its way thanks to a small kitchen squeezed into what would have been the wash house and some dodgy interior design choices made by the previous owner. Can he come up with a structural redesign and interior scheme with just £15,000? He also visits a medieval farmhouse in Kent that's like a perfectly preserved time capsule and needs an upgrade suitable for a young and rapidly growing family(n)

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: A power struggle unfolds as young chimp Carlos challenges dominant male Dylan, and Asian short-clawed otter Wallace is struck down by a mystery illness. Meanwhile, bush dog Franco's pack has stopped growing after his most recent litter died, and keepers hope that moving one of the breeding females to another zoo might solve the problem(n)

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: A five-year-old Great Dane is rushed to Fitzpatrick Referrals after losing the use of its back legs due to a slipped disc, with complications leaving the dog fighting for its life. A woman and her two children bring their pet spaniel to the practice after it is hit by a car, and a 10-year-old collie with hip dysplasia visits the surgery(n)

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: More than a decade ago, Kevin McCloud visited Brighton to meet a co-operative of 10 families, including former travellers and single parents, who were building their own and each other's homes, with the promise that the council would allow them to live in the finished properties at a reduced rent. For two years they laboured, balancing a 30-hour week with various other commitments. Now the presenter returns to see whether the houses, and the community that built them, have stood the test of time(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Dick and Angel look ahead to wedding season, with eight couples booking the chateau for their big day. Dick also converts a stone barn into a flat for Angel's parents, getting rid of 150 years' worth of rubbish in the process, but tensions rise between the couple when he gets carried away with the trees at the front of the property(n)

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: The Artemis reaches Jamaica, bringing Jamie and Claire closer to their goal. During a lavish ball on the island, the Frasers encounter old allies, as well as former adversaries(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Brian, 74, is brought into King's by ambulance after falling backwards down a flight of stairs and being knocked unconscious at his partner's house. Sylvester arrives in paediatric A&E with his two-year-old son, who has cut his forehead on a visit to church, while 70-year-old builder Leonard has lost sensation down his left side and the medics are worried he may have suffered a stroke(n)

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Regulars including hitherto perennial host Jimmy Carr are nudged to one side as Canadian comedian Katherine Ryan hosts an all-female edition of the words-and-numbers quiz, inviting Roisin Conaty and Jessica Hynes to take on Sara Pascoe and Lolly Adefope, as part of a celebration of 100 years of women's suffrage. As usual, Rachel Riley is at the letters and numbers board, while Morgana Robinson appears in character as EastEnders' Natalie Cassidy alongside wordsmith Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner(n)

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: A power struggle unfolds as young chimp Carlos challenges dominant male Dylan, and Asian short-clawed otter Wallace is struck down by a mystery illness. Meanwhile, bush dog Franco's pack has stopped growing after his most recent litter died, and keepers hope that moving one of the breeding females to another zoo might solve the problem(n)

Sylvester arrives in paediatric A&E with his two-year-old son, who has cut his forehead on a visit to church, while 70-year-old builder Leonard has lost sensation down his left side and the medics are worried he may have suffered a stroke(n)

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty finds out if eating too many poppy seeds could make him fail a drugs test, Kate Quilton learns the consequences of tipping waste cooking oil down the drain, and Matt Tebbutt has a Sicilian bake-off with an increasingly popular ancient grain bread(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Martial arts experts Dan and Sally Ferretti from Bristol have travelled the world for competitions, but are now looking to relax. Despite never having been to southern Spain before, this adventurous couple have decided to buy their very own holiday home there, and have identified the mountains around Malaga as the perfect place. Danni Menzies is on hand to show them five great properties for their £80,000 budget(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: With retirement rapidly approaching, Jan and Phil Jackson wish to relocate to the Canary Island of Fuerteventura, having been inspired by Jan's sister who has already made the move there. Property expert Scarlette Douglas shows them five detached villas within their £215,000 budget(n)

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Barbara and Stephen have had 20 happy years in their Victorian riverside cottage in Surrey, but with retirement looming, they are undecided what to do next. Stephen loves their home, while Barbara dreams of starting afresh in a new home - where she would need a separate room for her drum kit. Phil Spencer comes up with a few options should they decide to up sticks, while Kirstie Allsopp is full of ideas allowing Barbara to get out her sticks. Will they decide to stay or sell?(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Belinda and Lee welcome their first guests. Angela and Steve invite eight friends over to test-run their holiday business and Dick and Angel invite Tim and Krys over to their place(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Nursing manager Sarah hosts the first of a week of dinner parties in Leeds, taking inspiration from her husband's Middle Eastern heritage to offer her guests a Turkish fusion menu. Joining her is 28-year-old painter decorator Alex, 45-year-old bridal shop owner Abbi, 60-year-old community centre manager Janet and 56-year-old record label boss Phil. A hilarious evening lies in store, with unexpected tattoos, beauty tips and twerking(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Would-be clairvoyant Janet hosts the second of a week of dinner parties in Leeds and hopes her ghoul-themed dinner party will help her win the cash prize. Part of Janet's plan is to pretend her house is haunted and she has a practical joke lined up for nursing manager Sarah and bridal shop owner Abbi to find. With more surprises in store, will the fright-night theme be enough to ghost Janet into the lead?(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Record label owner Phil hosts the third night of a week of dinner parties in Leeds, hoping to win the £1,000 prize money by serving up a 1970s rock-themed menu. His guests are astounded by his mystery past, and painter and decorator Alex is unimpressed when wedding shop owner Abbi continues to wind him up(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Painter and decorator Alex hosts the fourth night in Leeds, hoping to win the prize money by serving up a cruise-themed menu from around the world - which impresses jealous rival Janet so much, she almost turns violent. Abbi continues to belittle the host - until he reveals he spends his evenings on stage impersonating a famous heart-throb singer. Will his performance bag him the top prize?(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Bridal shop owner Abbi hopes to woo her guests with a wedding-themed party on the final day of the competition in Leeds. All week Abbi and Michael Buble impersonator Alex have had a bit of a banter that has sailed close to the wind. Will the tension take over, or can the wedding theme create an amorous atmosphere that will help Abbi win the £1,000 prize?(n)

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home
programme.desc: George Clarke meets single father Rick, whose four-storey terrace in Stratford-upon-Avon has just one room per floor and is totally impractical when his children come to stay. Can the architect come up with a clever redesign to create space and much-needed character? He also helps single mum Donna in Hastings, whose Victorian double reception room has not been touched for 50 years(n)

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Young meerkat parents Huskie and Beagle have a new baby, Junior, but keepers have to step in when he falls gravely ill. Meanwhile, red panda Nima, who lost her partner last year, meets a new mate, Koda, but the pair do not get off to the best start, and in the penguin pool, a new male called Flounder arrives(n)

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Professor Noel Fitzpatrick tends to a Newfoundland called Billy, who clocks up thousands of miles travelling back and forth from his home in Aberdeen for treatment on its legs. He also attempts to help Barney, a Yorkshire terrier that has a deformity in its neck that is compressing its spinal cord. For owners Linda and Barry, Noel is their last chance, but the operation involves high-risk surgery with no guarantee of success(n)

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Leigh Osborne and Graham Voce want to convert and extend a landmark 150-year-old water tower in Kennington, south London, into a luxury home. Grade II-listed, derelict and with 6ft-thick walls, it's a huge challenge for the pair, who also plan to build two structures at the base - a lift shaft connected by a series of glass tunnels, and a modern living space. The result will be a four-bedroom property over nine floors, complete with a room at the top offering spectacular 360-degree views across the capital. Presented by Kevin McCloud(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: As summer arrives, Dick Strawbridge and Angel Adoree are busier than ever with seven weddings and 14 food lovers' weekends to prepare for. And as if that wasn't enough to keep them busy, they must also sort out the garden, work on a stables conversion and embark on a surprising floating adventure(n)

programme.title: New Amsterdam
programme.desc: The new medical director at America's oldest public hospital decides he will stop at nothing to breathe new life into this understaffed and underfunded establishment - even if it means tearing up its bureaucracy and starting all over again. Drama, starring Ryan Eggold(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Ellen, 86, has been brought in by ambulance after her daughters found her collapsed at home. Her body temperature has dropped dangerously low and she's also lost five pints of blood. Meanwhile, appendicitis is suspected when 75-year-old Martin is rushed in with severe abdominal pain, and neurologists perform tests to determine whether 70-year-old mother-of-10 Lula has suffered a stroke(n)

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: Documentary following the emergency services in Wiltshire, continuing with crimes relating to the rising use of cannabis. PC Joe Tompkinson is cut up at a roundabout and when he stops the car responsible, all he can smell is the drug. PC Adam Burson visits a family whose members have had a brick thrown through their front window - a dealer's retaliation - and officers are called by a mother after she is assaulted by her son, who is suspected to be suffering from cannabis psychosis(n)

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home(n)

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson gets to grips with a Peel P50, the smallest car to go into production, and finds a surprising number of uses for it. James May experiences the luxury of the Rolls-Royce Phantom Drophead Coupe convertible, and the Stig puts the Ferrari 599 GTB Fiorano through its paces on the test track. The Rolling Stones' Ronnie Wood is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car(n)

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike and Frank are presented with a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity in Texas and also uncover a stash that includes a meteorite(n)

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: Tempers flare between Brandon and his wife Lori as the bidding at an auction soon escalates(n)

programme.title: Storage Hunters

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Frank takes a wrong turn when making a delivery and ends up appearing on a quiz show and stumbling on a vintage motorcycle(n)

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: The bargain hunters head to an airport auction and compete for luggage and plane parts(n)

programme.title: American Pickers

programme.desc: Two teenagers throwing bricks engage in a rooftop stand-off with police, and officers seize a mobility car as the provider believes it has been used in crime(n)

programme.desc: The workshop struggles to convert three quad bikes into frontline police vehicles, while an officer has to crash a pursuit car to protect the public. Steve wants to share his home-made birthday cake - if only he can persuade someone to eat it(n)

programme.desc: Beat constructs a luxury fishing lodge, and Bryan Jr is coerced into giving the local gun shop a much-needed facelift(n)

programme.desc: Brian ingratiates himself with a touring theatrical group as he tries to reach the City of a Thousand Towers before the Super Solstice. Guest starring Sylvester McCoy(n)

programme.desc: The documentary explores a 1959 mission to uncover Nazi gold in an Austrian lake. A German journalist persuaded his editor to finance a quest to reveal what was in boxes dumped by a group of SS officers toward the end of the Second World War. programme.title: Time Team
programme.desc: Tony Robinson and the experts head to Llancaiach Fawr Manor, near Caerphilly, south Wales, to investigate an ancient moat. The team's geophysicists feel the site should provide them with the ideal conditions to determine what the ditch was originally designed to guard - but the project soon becomes one of the most baffling investigations in the programme's history(n)

programme.title: Time Team
programme.desc: Horse-owners Stephen and Stephanie Fry believe an 11th-century flour mill once stood on their land, and ask the experts to search for evidence. Mick Aston soon finds ample clues such as the remnants of millstreams used to power grindstones that suggest their theory is correct, but a problem arises when one of their finds does not fit in with the story(n)

programme.title: WW2 - Battles for Europe
programme.desc: Eye-witness veteran testimony from men who served under fire on the frontline, taking viewers to the heart of iconic moments in the history of warfare. The first episode looks at the Allied invasion of Europe, which began on June 6 1944 - D-Day. British, American and Canadian troops stormed the beaches of Normandy in what would become known as The Longest Day(n)

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Jamie Theakston looks at the life and work of Serbian inventor Nikola Tesla, investigating conspiracy theories that the scientific establishment and national governments covered up his work on energy sources. He also finds out why so little evidence of his experiments remains today(n)

programme.desc: Tony Robinson and the team investigate Gateholm Island, off the coast of Pembrokeshire, where a number of mysterious artefacts were discovered some time ago, suggesting the site was once of religious importance. The only way to get to the island is by rigging a 500-metre zip wire way above the wave-lashed rocks. The archaeologists battle inclement weather to begin a dig on the mainland, where team leader Francis Pryor sees characteristics suggestive of a classic Iron Age fort beginning to emerge(n)

But to achieve his dream, he must crowdfund £50,000, build a French-style eaterie out of rubble and convince the sceptical townsfolk to fall in love with the exotic food he will be serving(n)

Billy and Meredith go undercover to find out more about a woman seen wearing the same orange lipstick found in the vehicle belonging to the dead man, but soon turn their attention toward a man who claimed to be the deceased's real manager. Starring Debra Messing(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A woman is found bludgeoned into a coma, the apparent victim of date-rape. Briscoe and Green track down an employee in the state controller's office who had been stalking her, and find the drug Demerol in his car. Guest starring Sebastian Roche(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the murder of an insurance salesman who sold bogus policies to European Jews during the Second World War and soon discover the victim possessed valuable information about specific policy numbers that could provide a link to the culprit. Jerry Reach and Jesse L Martin star(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica investigates the demise of a flamboyant hypnotist, who died behind locked doors in front of an audience of mesmerised journalists. Mystery drama, guest starring Jose Ferrer(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica pulls out all the stops to help private eye Harry McGraw find his partner's murderer. Angela Lansbury and Jerry Orbach star(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica inherits shares in an American football team. When the owner of the squad is found dead she investigates a possible connection to a series of offers she has received to buy her out. Angela Lansbury stars(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: When a wealthy art patron is found murdered and her body mutilated, the team's inquiries lead to failed painter Larry Brunig, who objected to the obscene nature of the art supported and promoted by the victim - and a probe into his past reveals a violent history(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the discovery of a prostitute's body behind a rubbish bin. As inquiries get under way, they uncover a seedy case involving the shipping of illegal immigrants, police corruption and virtual sex(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: An explosion at an apartment building brings navy officer Terence Keith to the team's attention and it transpires he had been on medication for anxiety, a condition that had led to him being ejected from a pilot's training course. Ducky's profile of Keith suggests that he may be unstable and about to exact revenge for having his dream of becoming a fighter ace taken away from him, and evidence points to him intending to carry out a suicide attack(n)

programme.title: Ransom
programme.desc: As Eric and Zara provide risk assessment services at an investment bank, they are taken hostage by a gunman, and Eric must negotiate for their release(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and Stabler are called in to investigate when Cara Raleigh is found beaten in her home. Multiple sclerosis has left the former opera singer a quadriplegic and unable to speak, but by blinking she informs the detectives she was raped, but did not know her assailant. Cara's sister Janice points the finger of suspicion at three male nurses from an agency who she had fired after some cheques went missing. Guest starring Jill Scott(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Investigative journalist Jane Whitmore is found dead in her bed with an X carved into her cheek and her throat slashed. Inquiries lead the team to drug rehab centre worker Ned Bogden, who has been accused of eliciting sexual favours from his patients, and Cragen links him to unsolved murders from the 1970s committed by the so-called Bedtime Butcher. Guest starring Jaclyn Smith, Ann-Margret and William Atherton(n)

programme.title: Criminal Minds: Beyond Borders
programme.desc: Garrett and the International Response Team are called in to investigate when two American entrepreneurs disappear while doing business in Bangladesh(n)

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A homeless man arrested for stabbing an heiress admits breaking into the victim's house, but claims he was not involved in the crime. Horatio and the team investigate, and find the forensics expert for the defence is none other than Delko, whose intervention helps the suspect escape charges - only for further evidence to cast doubt on the case(n)

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Pop singer Phoebe Nichols reportedly burns to death on stage during a surprise concert in Miami, but analysis of the remains reveals that an impersonator died in her place. Manager Julian Diehl admits the real star mysteriously disappeared, forcing him to employ the services of a double - leaving Horatio trying to solve both a murder and a missing persons case. Crime drama, starring David Caruso(n)

programme.title: Chicago PD
programme.desc: The investigation of a jogger's brutal murder in a park is blocked by a church offering sanctuary to the prime suspects. Rixton goes behind Voight's back to question a gang member in relation to the case(n)

programme.title: Catch a Contractor
programme.desc: Newly divorced Kathy wanted the entire first floor of her condo renovated, and hired contractor Randy to do the remodelling. But all she got for the $8,000 she paid was a load of appliances in the living room, a dangerous fireplace, and a host of excuses. Adam Carolla and Skip assess the damage while Alison tracks Randy down and confronts him about his unfinished and shoddy work(n)

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The team tries to solve the mystery of how three volleyball players came to die of electrocution while competing in a beach tournament. Meanwhile, as the internal investigation draws to a close, Calleigh's testimony threatens Delko's future. Drama, guest starring Cheryl Ladd (Charlie's Angels) and Tia Carrere (Wayne's World)(n)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Stella is convinced that a woman's apparent suicide is a cover-up for murder, ending a three-year quest to trace her missing twin brother. The detective hurries to compile enough evidence to prove her instincts right and is nearly killed by the victim's stepfather - but with the culprit in custody, she hopes to find out more about the long-lost sibling. Crime drama, starring Melina Kanakaredes and Robert Joy(n)

programme.title: The Mysteries of Laura
programme.desc: The detective investigates the disappearance of a fertility doctor with connections to horse racing, and questions a jockey, a nurse and an irate patient in a bid to get to the bottom of the case. Comedy drama, starring Debra Messing(n)

programme.title: The Mysteries of Laura
programme.desc: The body of a Brazilian woman living in New York on a work visa is discovered in Central Park, and when Laura and the team investigate, they discover she had taken a job as an au pair for a young boy with autism - who has now gone missing. The detectives immediately suspect the lad's father, who lost access to his son during a nasty custody battle, but when it emerges that the victim also had a more sordid side-career with an escort agency, a new facet to her murder is revealed. Starring Debra Messing(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Detectives Green and Briscoe search for a gigolo suspected of killing an elderly rich woman and stealing a large amount of her jewellery, but as investigations progress, it becomes clear there is more to the murder than meets the eye. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A schizophrenic woman is found strangled, leading Green and Briscoe to suspect a homeless man of the murder. Taken into custody, he refuses to take his antidepressant medicine, rendering himself incapable of standing trial for murder. Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin star(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica takes over a congressman's seat in Washington while trying to find out who was responsible for his murder - but political shenanigans and sinister goings-on conspire to keep her from solving the crime. Mystery, starring Angela Lansbury(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica sets out to prove the innocence of an old friend who has become the prime suspect in a murder case that began with the discovery of a body at a mystery writers' convention. Angela Lansbury stars, with Paul Sand and Diana Muldaur(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica's car breaks down, leaving her stranded in the middle of nowhere, and she is forced to take a bus - unaware that one of her fellow passengers is a murderer. Guest starring Linda Blair (The Exorcist)(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the strangulation of a college graduate who moonlighted as a stripper to pay off her fees, and learn that the girl's death is linked to insider trading involving a former porn star and her mentor. Jerry Orbach stars(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The relatives of a wealthy woman found in a coma come under suspicion when the team investigates her subsequent death. It later transpires she was suffering from a degenerative disease, and the theory of a possible mercy killing crumbles when the family's affairs, both financial and sexual, come to light. David Dukes guest stars(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A woman is found murdered and Gibbs and McGee are called in when she is discovered to be carrying ID bearing the name Sgt Patricia Moreno, a US marine known to have died several years earlier. The victim is discovered to have come to America from Afghanistan and a necklace reveals a fingerprint that leads the team to a known assassin. Guest starring Lolita Davidovich(n)

programme.title: Criminal Minds: Beyond Borders
programme.desc: Two American flight attendants go missing while in Singapore, and Ryan and his International Response Team are called in to investigate. Crime drama, starring Gary Sinise(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and Stabler are called to the scene when a young man is discovered bludgeoned to death in a storage room at a hotel and a wallet found nearby identifies him as 16-year-old Andrew Hingham. However, when the teenager inexplicably contacts his mother while the detectives are questioning her, it quickly becomes clear this is a case of mistaken identity, and the real Andrew was with the murder victim in a romantic capacity. They propose that he murdered his boyfriend in a jealous rage - a possibility that becomes more likely with the news that Andrew spent time in a psychiatric ward for schizophrenia(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The detectives investigate the rape and murder of Laura Santiago, an animal rights campaigner who had been working on a documentary exposing shocking facts about the meat-processing industry. Her mentor, journalist Jake Bradshaw, tells them certain businesses did not like what she was doing and points them to the location of her last shoot(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and Stabler investigate the death of 17-year-old Anna McWilliams and discover she was using an internet site to arrange one-night stands with strangers. Warner reveals Anna was HIV positive - as was the man she was meant to meet on the night she died. Had he been deliberately passing on the virus by having unprotected sex?(n)

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A high-school teacher is cut in half by a sword-wielding killer, triggering an investigation that leads the team into the dangerous world of the Japanese mafia. As the case unfolds, Natalia's impaired hearing, caused by an injury sustained in a previous investigation, places her and Ryan in jeopardy. Crime drama, starring David Caruso, Eva La Rue and Jonathan Togo(n)

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A doctor on death row is granted a 24-hour stay of execution in light of new revelations from the only witness, who claims to have made false assertions at the original trial. With the deadline looming, Delko helps Horatio conduct a new investigation in the hope of preventing a miscarriage of justice(n)

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The body of a man who fell out of the sky is revealed to have injuries that could only have been sustained in zero gravity. Having ruled out the victim being a Nasa astronaut, Horatio and the team investigate Miami's sole private space-travel company. Crime drama, starring David Caruso(n)

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Alexx returns to help her former colleagues find the origins of a deadly strain of E.coli. Crime drama, starring Khandi Alexander(n)

programme.desc: A prisoner requests Hawkes' presence at his execution, and makes a confession that shocks the forensic scientist. Guest starring Harold Perrineau (Lost, Oz) and Edward Furlong (Terminator 2, American History X)(n)

programme.title: The Mysteries of Laura
programme.desc: The detective investigates the murder of a chef who was addicted to sex after his frozen body is discovered at a processing plant. Laura heads to the restaurant where the dead man worked and realises its walk-in freezer is the scene of the crime, but the key to solving the case could lie with either the victim's colleagues or one of his partners. Starring Debra Messing(n)

programme.title: The Mysteries of Laura
programme.desc: Laura's former fiance Dr Andrew Devlin is suspected of murdering his ex-wife, so the detective sets about trying to determine his innocence - something that proves tricky when all the evidence leads back to him. Comedy drama, starring Debra Messing(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A separated couple blame each other for concealing their missing baby, but the discovery of bloodstains in their apartment suggests another, more tragic explanation. An angry Briscoe suspects the father of murder - until the infant's remains are found, raising the possibility that both parents could be responsible(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Part one of two. Best-selling mystery writer PK Todd and her accountant are gunned down outside a restaurant. Miraculously, Todd survives but her companion is mortally wounded, prompting Briscoe and Green to launch a murder inquiry and discover the culprit's real target. However, they soon find themselves mixed up in a deadly case of jealousy and betrayal. Guest starring Ruthie Henshall and Tom Berenger(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A Broadway actress comes out of retirement to star with her daughter in a musical produced by her son - but soon finds her life in danger. Luckily, Jessica has been invited along to see the show by nephew Grady and decides to investigate. Guest starring Vivian Blaine and Lorna Luft, with Angela Lansbury(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica injures her leg in a minor accident at an airport and is admitted to hospital - where she soon uncovers foul play. Crime drama, starring Angela Lansbury(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The team examines the apparently accidental death of a man trying to solve the killing of his son in Chile 30 years earlier. As the investigations gather pace, the officers are embroiled in a belated murder trial(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The team investigates a disabled boy's death in an apartment fire, focusing inquiries not only on a tenant who lived in the same building and had been linked to several previous blazes, but also on the victim's parents, who had struggled to cope with the strain of looking after him. With Jerry Orbach, Dianne Wiest and guest star Rudolph Giuliani(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs and the team investigate when naval cryptanalyst Andrew Wells is shot dead in a park outside Baltimore. At the scene, Tony spots a man who was one of his informants from 15 years earlier when he was a police officer, but who went into hiding after a bid to bring down the Russian mobsters he worked for went wrong. Drama, starring Mark Harmon(n)

programme.title: Chicago PD
programme.desc: Voight and the team tackle a gang using a master key to commit a series of robberies. They also try to clear the name of a dead firefighter thought to be in cahoots with the gang(n)

programme.desc: Stabler's former colleague Jo Marlowe (Sharon Stone) joins the SVU as the team's new ADA and questions a fire marshal's version of events after a man is accused of setting a fire in which his two daughters died. Marlowe believes the suspect's claims of innocence and calls in private investigator Iggy Drexel - who comes up with another theory about how the blaze started. Guest starring Brad Dourif (Deadwood)(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Stabler and Benson set out to track down a pregnant rape victim who has disappeared from hospital and uncover an illegal adoption operation, leading them to pose as husband and wife to obtain the evidence they need to trap those responsible. programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

However, Cragen discovers the crime was a homicide, and Benson and Stabler have to tread carefully since the victims had generously donated to both a police charity and the mayor. Their daughter Anne claims a man has been stalking her, but he turns out to be a detective investigating her for fraud - who also suspects she killed her parents for their money. Guest starring Naveen Andrews (Lost) and Edward Hibbert (Frasier)(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Nicki Chapman helps two Naval officers find their dream home in Herefordshire, but they cannot decide whether to increase their budget to more than £450,000. The presenter also joins in with the marigold harvest at a local organic farm(n)

programme.title: Lusitania: 18 Minutes That Changed World War One
programme.desc: Docudrama about the sinking of British ocean liner RMS Lusitania 11 miles off the southern coast of Ireland by a German U-boat on May 7, 1915, which resulted in the deaths of 1,198 passengers and crew and was a key factor in the US's entry into the First World War. The events of that day are brought to life using archive footage, photographs, documents, dramatic reconstructions and expert opinion by marine historians, as well as first-hand testimonies by survivors and the submarine captain(n)

programme.title: Britain's Biggest Primary School
programme.desc: This edition of the documentary about life at Gascoigne Primary School in Barking, east London, follows three very different boys the school supports in various ways. Year 5 pupil Cleyson is on the 'gifted and talented' list, but he has a hot temper and has recently been temporarily excluded for hurting another pupil, and staff are keen to help him avoid offending again as it could jeopardise his education. The school assigns teaching assistant Luke Brown to support 11-year-old Lewis, who has ADHD, while seven-year-old Toby is finding settling down in Year 2 a slow process(n)

programme.title: Filming My Father: In Life and Death
programme.desc: In 2010, Steve Isaac was a fit 51-year-old father of three when he was diagnosed as having motor neurone disease and given two years to live. This film, to which his 22-year-old son Fraser contributed footage, documents the details of Steve's progressive condition and the decline in his health as muscles wasted away, as well as revealing the effect it has had on his family, who have been pushed to the brink by his desire to live at almost any cost. Four-and-a-half years on, Steve has defied medical expectation, but his only method of communicating now is blinking(n)

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Ground-breaking research suggests that changes to the bacteria living inside humans are making one in three people develop allergies. This programme follows an experiment involving members of two families to find out what it is in the modern world that's to blame. Mini-cameras, GPS units and the latest gene-sequencing technology help to uncover the impact of today's western lifestyle on their bacteria, why they are becoming allergic and what they can do in a bid to put a stop to the epidemic(n)

programme.title: Worlds Apart with Oksana Boyko
programme.desc: Worlds Apart is a fast-paced, in-depth discussion on the pressing issues of the day. The host Oksana Boyko strives to depart from the traditional Q-and-A form of interview in favor of an emotive and engaging conversation. While the title and format of the program presuppose differences of opinion, WA's main goal is to facilitate public debate in an intelligent and respectful manner(n)
